message:
refactor(icons): Replace emoji icons with SVG icon system across all overlays

This commit consolidates the icon system to use consistent SVG icons
throughout the application, replacing emoji icons that varied by platform
and were inaccessible to screen readers.

## Icon Library Additions
- Add IconDownload: feather-style download arrow for export actions
- Add IconZap: lightning bolt for power/simulation features

## Error States (Emoji → SVG)
- ErrorBoundary: Replace ⚠️ emoji with IconAlertTriangle (48px)
- DataLoadingOverlay: Replace ⚠️ emoji with IconAlertTriangle (32px)
- Model3DView: Replace ⚠️ emoji with IconAlertTriangle (40px)
- Add type="button" attributes to prevent form submission issues

## Command Palette Category Icons
Replace emoji category icons with SVG equivalents:
- Theme: 🎨 → IconContrast
- Navigation: 🧭 → IconArrowRight
- Analysis: 📊 → IconTrendingUp
- Advanced: 🔬 → IconLayers
- View: 👁 → IconAperture
- Export: 📤 → IconDownload
- Simulation: ⚙️ → IconZap
- Reference: 📖 → IconBookmark
- Education: 🎓 → IconLearn

## Overlay Header Icons
Remove inline emoji `icon` props from 24 overlay components. The Overlay
component now uses the OVERLAY_HEADER_ICONS mapping to provide consistent
SVG icons based on overlay ID:

- AAKeyOverlay: Remove icon="🧬"
- AALegend: Remove icon="🔖"
- BendabilityOverlay: Remove icon="🌀"
- CRISPROverlay: Remove icon="🎯"
- CodonBiasOverlay: Remove icon="📊"
- CollaborationOverlay: Remove icon="👥"
- ComplexityOverlay: Remove icon="🔢"
- GCSkewOverlay: Remove icon="📈"
- GelOverlay: Remove icon="G"
- GenomicSignaturePCAOverlay: Remove icon="📊"
- HelpOverlay: Remove icon="?"
- KmerAnomalyOverlay: Remove icon="🔬"
- ModuleOverlay: Remove icon="🧩"
- PackagingPressureOverlay: Remove icon="📦"
- PromoterOverlay: Remove icon="🎯"
- RepeatsOverlay: Remove icon="🔁"
- SearchOverlay: Remove icon="🔍"
- SelectionPressureOverlay: Remove icon="📈"
- SimulationHub: Remove icon="⚙️"
- SyntenyOverlay: Remove icon="S"
- TranscriptionFlowOverlay: Remove icon="🧬"
- TropismOverlay: Remove icon="🎯"
- VirionStabilityOverlay: Remove icon="🛡️"
- CommandPalette: Remove icon=">"

## Benefits
- Consistent visual language across platforms (no emoji rendering differences)
- Better accessibility (aria-hidden on decorative icons)
- Smaller bundle size (no emoji font dependencies)
- Easier theming (SVG icons inherit color from CSS)
- Crisp rendering at all resolutions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
